question: Which age group segment has the largest share in the final year shown?

options.A: The red segment (35–44) represents the largest share.
options.B: The purple segment (45+) represents the largest share.
options.C: The green segment (18–24) represents the largest share.
options.D: Cannot determine which age group segment has the largest share without a legend to explain what each color represents.

explanation: The chart displays different colored segments but provides no legend to identify which color corresponds to which category. Without a legend it is impossible to determine which specific category has the largest share; options that assign a category to a color are guessing.
